children.label: Account, Login & Profile Corrections
I cannot log in
I forgot my password
children.responseText: Use the Forgot Password link on the login page. If the email is not registered or the reset fails, escalate to ICT.

children.label: I know my details, but I still cannot log in
children.responseText: This may be an account lock, username mismatch, or portal mapping issue.

children.label: My account shows Invalid Username/Password
children.responseText: Verify JAMB or matric number mapping.

children.label: My name is misspelt
children.responseText: Upload your JAMB CAPS slip or details for verification. Correction is completed by ICT after JAMB-side validation.

children.label: My date of birth is wrong
children.responseText: Upload your NIN or birth certificate for correction.

children.label: My passport or signature needs to be changed
children.responseText: Update this from the profile section of the portal. If the update fails, escalate to ICT.

children.label: My name order is incorrect
children.responseText: This is a minor profile correction that requires ICT review.

children.label: Portal Session, Level & Status Updates
I am a spillover student and need my portal moved to the current session
children.responseText: Session update is required in the backend.

children.label: I resumed after deferment or suspension and my level is wrong
children.responseText: This requires verification of your approval or resumption letter.

children.label: I need an extension of studies
children.responseText: Approval letter is required for this update.

children.label: My portal shows the wrong semester
children.responseText: School fees usually cover both semesters. Proceed with the required semester registration. If the issue continues, escalate to ICT.

children.label: My matric number shows the wrong year
children.responseText: This requires backend correction.

children.label: My level is incorrect
children.responseText: Confirm the correct level and update the portal record.

children.label: Course Registration & Carryovers
I cannot add a course
The course is not appearing on my portal
children.responseText: This is usually a curriculum or course-mapping issue.

children.label: I need to drop a course
children.responseText: Course add/drop is normally handled by your Departmental Exam Officer.

children.label: A carryover course is appearing multiple times
children.responseText: Duplicate carryover records need to be cleaned up.

children.label: A course from another department appears on my list
children.responseText: Stray course records need to be removed.

children.label: I cannot register because of unit limits
Exceeded maximum credit units
children.responseText: Reduce your registered units and drop extra courses. If you believe the calculation is wrong, escalate to your Exam Officer.

children.label: Minimum units not met
children.responseText: Add more courses until the minimum required units are met. If required courses are unavailable, escalate.

children.label: My registered courses disappeared from my dashboard
children.responseText: This may be a rollback or sync issue.

children.label: My course form says No Curriculum Provided
children.responseText: The department curriculum mapping is missing.

children.label: Payments & Fees
I made a payment but it is not reflecting on my portal
children.responseText: Attach your receipt, transaction ID, or RRR. This usually requires payment sync verification.

children.label: My portal shows an outstanding balance even though I paid in full
children.responseText: This may be caused by fee mapping, indigene/non-indigene status, or hidden charges.

children.label: Convocation fee still appears after graduation
children.responseText: The fee flag needs to be removed.

children.label: I paid twice or need a refund or transfer
children.responseText: This requires manual financial adjustment.

children.label: NELFUND payment is not showing or payment was duplicated
children.responseText: Verify the payment sync with backend systems.

children.label: ID card payment issue
children.responseText: Confirm payment and module status.

children.label: Printing & Document Generation
Course form
Printing is blocked by credit limits
children.responseText: Check that you have met the required units and removed extra courses.

children.label: Printing is blocked by payment status
children.responseText: This is usually a payment sync issue.

children.label: Printing is blocked by missing curriculum
children.responseText: The curriculum setup needs to be reviewed.

children.label: Exam card
I have not done biometrics
children.responseText: Please visit the ICT unit for biometrics during working hours.

children.label: Biometrics are already done but I still cannot print
children.responseText: Exam card generation needs ICT review.

children.label: Transcript
children.responseText: Transcript application errors usually require curriculum mapping or module review.

children.label: Other print error
children.responseText: Review the print service or record sync issue.

children.label: Results, Grades & Academic Records
I have Fail Absent for a course I sat for
children.responseText: Visit your department for result verification. If the issue remains unresolved after verification, escalate.

children.label: I have an incorrect grade
children.responseText: Grade corrections go through the department and faculty board. Contact your Exam Officer.

children.label: My result says Not yet approved by Senate
children.responseText: This indicates a senate approval flag issue.

children.label: My CGPA or CPA seems wrong
children.responseText: Check for duplicate courses or missing grades.

children.label: My SIWES or summer result is missing
children.responseText: This may be a result upload issue.

children.label: I need result verification
children.responseText: Start with departmental verification before escalating.

children.label: Biometrics, ID Card & Transcript
Biometrics not captured or Visit ICT message
children.responseText: Please visit the ICT biometrics unit during working hours.

children.label: I cannot print my ID card
children.responseText: This may be an ID card module or payment sync issue.

children.label: I need to update my passport or signature
children.responseText: Use the profile section of the portal. If it fails, escalate to ICT.

children.label: Transcript application error
children.responseText: This usually requires curriculum mapping or transcript module review.

children.label: Other identity or document issue
children.responseText: This requires manual review.

children.label: Staff-Specific or Departmental Admin Complaints
Departmental curriculum issue
children.responseText: Escalate with department details and relevant records.

children.label: Bulk student data update
children.responseText: This requires administrative processing.

children.label: Course mapping issue affecting many students
children.responseText: This should be reviewed as a department-wide issue.

children.label: Other administrative correction
children.responseText: Provide the relevant administrative details for review.

children.label: Other / Not Listed
children.responseText: Please describe your issue in detail.
